results.notes: Wired resolve_chain(resolve_draw(2), resolve_create_token('Glimmer' enchantment-creature 1/1 white)). Auto-pattern wouldn't combine draw + token correctly and 'Glimmer' is not in the default subtype list.

results.engine_gap: library search by subtype + delirium (4+ card types in graveyard) branch to any-card search
results.notes: Library tutor with conditional any-card search based on delirium count; bespoke interactive flow.

results.engine_gap: fight-style damage from target's power to each other creature + delayed 'dies->exile-top, may-play-this-turn' floating effect
results.notes: Two engine gaps in one card: damage-equal-to-power sweep and a delayed conditional exile/play replacement.

results.engine_gap: shuffle target permanent into library + may-shuffle up-to-four graveyard cards into library (multi-target graveyard selection)
results.notes: Permanent-into-library is a non-standard zone change; multi-target graveyard selection needs interactive prompt.

results.engine_gap: additional cost (choose creature you control or reveal creature card from hand) + damage equal to chosen/revealed creature's power
results.notes: Additional cost choice is a casting-time mechanic; resolve depends on the chosen entity's power.

results.engine_gap: mill 3 + graveyard target reanim (creature-or-land to hand) + GY-activated ability to fetch named card from any zone
results.notes: Bespoke; needs interactive graveyard target choice and a graveyard activated ability.

results.engine_gap: manifest dread (DSK mechanic; resolves to face-down 2/2 + graveyard) + graveyard target reanim (return permanent to hand)
results.notes: Manifest dread emits an event the engine can handle, but the may-return-permanent-to-hand step needs graveyard targeting.

results.engine_gap: anthem-style temporary keyword grant to all Gremlins you control until end of turn (menace, lifelink, haste)
results.notes: Wired resolve_create_token (3 Gremlins); the temporary tribal anthem is left as engine gap (would need a static interceptor scoped to the spell). Token wiring matters because 'Gremlin' is not in the default auto-pattern subtype list.

results.engine_gap: discard-your-hand + draw X based on graveyard card-type count (dynamic X)
results.notes: Discard-entire-hand and dynamic-X draw are both gaps without a way to count card types or read the resolved count.

results.engine_gap: graveyard target reanim with finality counter + flashback alt-cast
results.notes: Graveyard targeting plus finality counter ETB. Flashback handled separately by setup_interceptors.
